x-enumeration-literals.name: Initiated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction has been created but processing has not yet begun.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Executed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction has been carried out and funds have been processed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction has been withdrawn or stopped before completion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Confirmed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction has been successfully verified and acknowledged by the system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspended
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction is temporarily on hold due to conditions or restrictions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction is awaiting processing or further action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Completed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction has been fully processed and finalized.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Notified
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that relevant parties have been informed about the transaction status.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Booked
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction has been recorded in the system and the corresponding financial entry has been posted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the transaction was not accepted during processing and has not been executed.
